title: Featured - Old Textures and New
description: A texture pack able to contain both old and new minecraft textures.
body:
**Dependencies(Optional, **check each version details**):**
- **_Double-block textures don't require any dependencies._**
- Variant-CIT: Essential for Old items
- Continuity: block transition and connecting, ore borders
- Iris+Sodium: With shader, block efficiently glows


1. **Double the block textures**: Randomize between ****Pre&Post 1.17.1**** block textures such as, ore, planks, cobblestone...
   
    ![Ores, cobblestone, wood variate between two textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e7aaab0872a0a271c208070d725831e10055bd_0.webp)
2. **Double the item textures**: rename that contains "**,**" to _****swap between old&new****_ for items: swords, ingots etc. 
   【**Require Variants-CIT/Optifine/CIT Resewn** See optional mods!】
   
      ![Anvil rename an item with "," turns them old!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca16b1bfade18703b74791f58ad1e7effaafa540.png)

   
3. **Optional pack (unzip and use)**: 
    - **Ft. Utilities:** ****glowy ores and borders****, transparent pumpkins, fire; darker infested blocks, immature crops, connected textures (require Iris + Continuity)
    - **Ft. Short swords:** short old swords
   
    ![In a dark cave, ores with corners and borders emitting light.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b91f1a4c90d1f1e0aa50a3d4b13cf5775909b30_0.webp)

4. Use command to get an old item: 
    - before 1.21.4 /give @s item{"CustomModelData":10}
    - 1.21.4 /give @s item[Custom_Model_Data=10]
    - 1.21.5 - 1.21.10 /give @a item["custom_model_data"={"strings":['10']}]
    - This method does not work after 1.21.10

**If you encounter some bugs, there is a bug-free version.**
